  • Uses of ICommand in io.apicurio.datamodels.cmd.commands

    Classes in io.apicurio.datamodels.cmd.commands that implement ICommand
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractReplaceNodeCommand<T extends Node>
    Base class for commands that replace entire nodes.
    class 
    AbstractSchemaInhCommand
     
    class 
    AddCallbackCommand
    A command used to add a callback to an operation or to components/callbacks.
    class 
    AddChannelItemCommand
    A command used to add a new channelItem in a document.
    class 
    AddExampleCommand
    A command used to add an Example to a MediaType, Parameter, or Header.
    class 
    AddExampleDefinitionCommand
    A command used to add a new example definition in a document.
    class 
    AddExtensionCommand
    A command used to add a vendor extension to any extensible node.
    class 
    AddHeaderDefinitionCommand
    A command used to add a new header definition in a document.
    class 
    AddLinkCommand
    A command used to add a link to a response or to components/links.
    class 
    AddMediaTypeCommand
    A command used to add a media type to any node that supports content (request body, response, header, parameter).
    class 
    AddOperationSecurityRequirementCommand
    A command used to add a security requirement to an operation.
    class 
    AddParameterCommand
    A command used to add a new parameter to a path item or operation.
    class 
    AddParameterDefinitionCommand
    A command used to add a new parameter definition in a document.
    class 
    AddPathItemCommand
    A command used to add a new pathItem in a document.
    class 
    AddRequestBodyCommand
    A command used to add a request body to an operation (OpenAPI 3.0+ only).
    class 
    AddRequestBodyDefinitionCommand
    A command used to add a new request body definition in a document.
    class 
    AddResponseCommand
    A command used to add a response to an operation.
    class 
    AddResponseDefinitionCommand
    A command used to add a new response definition in a document.
    class 
    AddResponseHeaderCommand
    A command used to add a header to a response.
    class 
    AddSchemaDefinitionCommand
    A command used to add a new definition in a document.
    class 
    AddSchemaPropertyCommand
    A command used to add a new property to a schema definition in a document.
    class 
    AddSecurityRequirementCommand
    A command used to create a new security requirement in a document.
    class 
    AddSecuritySchemeCommand
    A command used to add a new security scheme to a document.
    class 
    AddServerCommand
    A command used to add a new server to any node that supports servers.
    class 
    AddServerVariableCommand
    A command used to add a variable to a server.
    class 
    AddTagCommand
    A command used to add a new tag to a document.
    class 
    AggregateCommand
    A command used to aggregate an array of other commands into a single logical command.
    class 
    ChangeContactCommand
     
    class 
    ChangeDescriptionCommand
    A command used to modify the description of a document.
    class 
    ChangeExtensionCommand
    A command used to change the value of a vendor extension on any extensible node.
    class 
    ChangeLicenseCommand
    A command used to modify the license information of a document.
    class 
    ChangeMediaTypeSchemaCommand
    A command used to set or change the schema on a media type entry.
    class 
    ChangePropertyCommand<T>
    A command used to modify the simple property of a node.
    class 
    ChangeTitleCommand
    A command used to modify the title of a document.
    class 
    ChangeVersionCommand
    A command used to modify the version of a document.
    class 
    CreateOperationCommand
    A command used to create a new operation on a path item.
    class 
    CreatePathCommand
    A command used to create a new empty path item in a document.
    class 
    CreateSchemaCommand
    A command used to create a new empty schema definition in a document.
    class 
    DeleteAllChildSchemasCommand
    A command used to delete all child schemas from a schema.
    class 
    DeleteAllExamplesCommand
    A command used to delete a single mediaType from an operation.
    class 
    DeleteAllExtensionsCommand
    A command used to delete all extensions from a node.
    class 
    DeleteAllHeadersCommand
    A command used to delete all headers from a document.
    class 
    DeleteAllOperationsCommand
    A command used to delete all operations from a path
    class 
    DeleteAllParametersCommand
    A command used to delete all parameters from: PathItem, Operation
    class 
    DeleteAllPropertiesCommand
    A command used to delete all properties from a schema.
    class 
    DeleteAllResponsesCommand
     
    class 
    DeleteAllSecurityRequirementsCommand
    A command used to delete all security requirements from a document or operation.
    class 
    DeleteAllSecuritySchemesCommand
    A command used to delete all security schemes from a document or operation.
    class 
    DeleteAllServersCommand
    A command used to delete all servers from a document.
    class 
    DeleteAllTagsCommand
    A command used to delete all tags from a document.
    class 
    DeleteCallbackCommand
    A command used to delete a callback from an operation or from components/callbacks.
    class 
    DeleteContactCommand
    A command used to delete the contact.
    class 
    DeleteExampleDefinitionCommand
    A command used to delete a single reusable example definition from a document.
    class 
    DeleteExtensionCommand
    A command used to delete a single extension.
    class 
    DeleteHeaderDefinitionCommand
    A command used to delete a single reusable header definition from a document.
    class 
    DeleteLicenseCommand
    A command used to delete the license.
    class 
    DeleteLinkCommand
    A command used to delete a link from a response or from components/links.
    class 
    DeleteMediaTypeCommand
    A command used to delete a single mediaType from an operation.
    class 
    DeleteNodeCommand<T extends Node>
    A command used to delete a child node.
    class 
    DeleteOperationCommand
    A command used to delete an operation from a path item.
    class 
    DeleteOperationSecurityRequirementCommand
    A command used to delete a security requirement from an operation by index.
    class 
    DeleteParameterCommand
    A command used to delete a parameter from a path item or operation.
    class 
    DeleteParameterDefinitionCommand
    A command used to delete a single reusable parameter definition from a document.
    class 
    DeletePathCommand
    A command used to delete a path item from a document.
    class 
    DeleteRequestBodyCommand
    A command used to delete a request body from an operation (OpenAPI 3.0+ only).
    class 
    DeleteRequestBodyDefinitionCommand
    A command used to delete a single reusable request body definition from a document.
    class 
    DeleteResponseCommand
    A command used to delete a response from an operation.
    class 
    DeleteResponseHeaderCommand
    A command used to delete a header from a response.
    class 
    DeleteSchemaCommand
    A command used to delete a schema definition from a document.
    class 
    DeleteSchemaPropertyCommand
    A command used to delete a single property from a schema definition in a document.
    class 
    DeleteSecurityRequirementCommand
    A command used to delete a document-level security requirement by index.
    class 
    DeleteSecuritySchemeCommand
    A command used to delete a single security scheme from a document.
    class 
    DeleteServerCommand
    A command used to delete a server from any node that supports servers.
    class 
    DeleteServerVariableCommand
    A command used to delete a variable from a server.
    class 
    DeleteTagCommand
    A command used to delete a single tag from a document.
    class 
    EnsureChildNodeCommand
    A command used to ensure that a child node exists.
    class 
    RefactorCallbackDefinitionCommand
    A command used to rename a callback definition and update all $ref references.
    class 
    RefactorExampleDefinitionCommand
    A command used to rename an example definition and update all $ref references.
    class 
    RefactorHeaderDefinitionCommand
    A command used to rename a header definition and update all $ref references.
    class 
    RefactorLinkDefinitionCommand
    A command used to rename a link definition and update all $ref references.
    class 
    RefactorParameterDefinitionCommand
    A command used to rename a parameter definition and update all $ref references.
    class 
    RefactorRequestBodyDefinitionCommand
    A command used to rename a request body definition and update all $ref references.
    class 
    RefactorResponseDefinitionCommand
    A command used to rename a response definition and update all $ref references.
    class 
    RefactorSchemaDefinitionCommand
    A command used to rename a schema definition and update all $ref references.
    class 
    RenameTagCommand
    A command used to rename a tag.
    class 
    ReplaceOperationCommand
    A command used to replace an operation with a newer version.
    class 
    ReplacePathItemCommand
    A command used to replace a path item with a newer version.
    class 
    ReplaceResponseDefinitionCommand
    A command used to replace a response definition with a newer version.
    class 
    ReplaceSchemaDefinitionCommand
    A command used to replace a definition schema with a newer version.
    class 
    ReplaceSecurityRequirementCommand
    A command used to replace a definition schema with a newer version.
    class 
    SetExternalDocsCommand
    A command to set external documentation on a node (Document, Tag, Operation, or Schema).
    class 
    SetPropertyCommand<T>
    A command used to modify the simple property of a node.
    class 
    UpdateNodeCommand
    A command used to update a node with new content.
    class 
    UpdateSecuritySchemeCommand
    A command used to update (replace) an existing security scheme in a document.
